class_balance.description: Images column counts images containing at least one object of class.

class_cooccurrence.title: Co-occurrence Matrix
class_cooccurrence.description: Cell [i,j] is number of images that contain both classes i and j.

class_sizes.description: Area and height are relative to image size where (%) columns are 0-100 scale.

objects_distribution.title: Objects on images - distribution for every class
objects_distribution.description: Value = number of images where class has exactly x objects.
